cards.title: Mechanic / Repair
bullets: Lead with a pain point — "Is your check engine light on?" or "Tired of overpriced dealership repairs?"
Free multi-point inspection or $X off first service drives clicks
Local trust — show your team, shop, real reviews

cards.title: Collision / Body Shop
bullets: "We work directly with all insurance companies"
"Free Estimate" is the #1 CTA in this category
Free rental car / free tow partnership adds perceived value
Insurance claim expertise removes customer fear

cards.title: Auto Detailing
bullets: Transformation content — dirty vs. clean is highly shareable
Video reels get the most organic boost; use for ads too
"Book Today" + urgency ("Only 3 slots left this week")
Package bundles (interior + exterior) with a discount perform well
Mobile detailing angle ("We come to you") is a strong differentiator

cards.title: Vehicle Wraps
bullets: "Turn your vehicle into a moving billboard"
Portfolio carousel — show your best work
Lead with portfolio + social proof, not discounts
Target local business owners for commercial wraps (fleet)

cards.title: Window Tinting
bullets: Static image — clear before/after with shade comparison
UV protection + privacy + energy savings (multiple pain points)

cards.title: Ceramic Coating
bullets: "Your car's paint deserves better than wax"
High-quality video showing water beading / gloss
"Get a Free Consultation" — high-ticket, educate first
Limited-time pricing or bundle with PPF
Long-term value ("Protects for 5+ years") justifies price

cards.title: Paint Protection Film (PPF)
bullets: Side-by-side comparison video or scratch demo
"Get a Free Quote" — PPF is a premium, researched purchase
Bundle PPF + ceramic coating for package pricing
New car owners are the #1 target — catch them early

highlight.title: Where to Start
bullets: Launch with detailing + mechanic ads — highest ad volume, most tested playbooks
Before/after video content is the #1 winning format across all categories
Run a lead-gen ad with "Free Estimate / Free Inspection" offer
Target: Springfield/Eugene OR, 25–55, vehicle owners, homeowners
Bundle services (e.g. tint + ceramic + PPF) for higher-ticket packages
Start at $15–25/day per service category, scale what converts
